name: cross-platform
description: Day-to-day guide for distributing Augx extension modules into Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and GitHub Copilot via 'augx export' and 'augx link --mirror'. Covers per-tool target paths, drift resolution, Windows symlink fallback, and the MCP-first task-context contract.

steps: Read rules/windows-fallback.md when running on Windows without Developer Mode

export_command.description: Aggregate linked modules into the native single-file format of Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, or GitHub Copilot.

mirror_hook.description: Per-module materialization into each tool's per-module rules directory with symlink-or-copy semantics.

drift_resolution.description: Playbook for resolving the 'exit 3 / hand-edited target' refusal from 'augx export'.

windows_fallback.description: Documented EPERM/EACCES/ENOSYS fallback from symlink to copy, recorded once in coordination.mirrors.

mcp_task_context.description: MCP-first contract: exported files contain zero live task data; agents query the Beads MCP server instead.

contents: README.md - Module overview, quick reference, per-tool target paths.
rules/export-guide.md - Day-to-day 'augx export' usage and flags.
rules/mirror-guide.md - Day-to-day 'augx link --mirror' usage and flags.
rules/windows-fallback.md - Symlink-to-copy fallback behavior on Windows.
rules/mcp-snippet-inlining.md - When and how the Beads MCP snippet is inlined.
examples/end-to-end-session.md - Walkthrough of a full link -> mirror -> export -> unlink session.
